Writing

My more recent writing and projects can be found on Art Fish Intelligence ↗

Data Science

Dec 2021

When 97% of your Machine Learning Engineer Interviews are with Men

Of the 33 interviews I had for machine learning engineering roles, only 1 was with a woman.

 Sep 2021

Measuring Semantic Changes Using Temporal Word Embeddings

A guide to how temporal word embeddings can be used to measure word evolution and some considerations regarding stability of embedding methods.

 Mar 2021

The Effect of Government Type on COVID-19 Restrictions

Were authoritarian governments more likely to enact more restrictive COVID-19 measures than democratic governments?

Essays

Mar 2020

Now Is the Time to Make Online Schools Available to Everyone

It's time to talk about the need for an equitable, inclusive, global, and fully remote education system.

 Nov 2019

Why I Write

Musings on the importance of writing to my identity.
